content: Quando afferma di desiderare la vita eterna, in realtà l'uomo solo vuole evitare una morte prematura, violenta o raccapricciante.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Guybrush88 (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: eng:When he claims to desire eternal life, in reality man merely wishes to avoid a premature, violent or gruesome death
